0.response: {"Q0":"I just tried to remember the rules. When the galaxy showed up, I thought top or bottom for my choice so I'd remember later. The keys started becoming second nature sometimes. But I had some lapses and had to refocus."}

7.response: {"Q0":"Mostly the highest probability was my choice unless the two were close and the lower probability had a higher value that seemed worth the risk. And I made a few mistakes picking the wrong direction."}

1.response: {"Q0":"The only thing that changes was the red planet astronaut left so I had to remember not to dig on the red planet or pick red gems from the meteor shower."}

8.response: {"Q0":"No, I was focused on everything equally."}
